ddls:
CREATE TABLE "geospatial_objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geospatial object */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of the geospatial object (e.g., line, polygon, point) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the geospatial object */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the object was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the object was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the object */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the object */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the object is associated with */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the object (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_objects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_objects_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_objects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "line_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each line property */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geospatial object */,
  "points" TEXT /* Array of points defining the line (latitude and longitude) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the line (hexadecimal) */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the line */,
  "dotted_line" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the line is dotted */,
  "arrow_line" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the line has an arrow */,
  "opacity" REAL /* Opacity of the line */,
  "line_style" TEXT /* Style of the line (e.g., solid, dashed, dotted) */,
  "arrow_position" TEXT /* Position of the arrow (e.g., start, end, both) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_line_properties_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES geospatial_objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "point_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each point property */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geospatial object */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the point */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label for the point */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the point (e.g., circle, marker) */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to a custom icon for the point */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the point */,
  "opacity" REAL /* Opacity of the point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_point_properties_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES geospatial_objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polygon_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each polygon property */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geospatial object */,
  "points" TEXT /* Array of points defining the polygon (latitude and longitude) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the border */,
  "fill_color" TEXT /* Fill color of the polygon */,
  "border_width" REAL /* Width of the border */,
  "opacity" REAL /* Opacity of the polygon */,
  "fill_opacity" REAL /* Opacity of the fill color */,
  "border_style" TEXT /* Style of the border (e.g., solid, dashed, dotted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polygon_properties_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES geospatial_objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data analyst, GIS specialist) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geospatial object being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the object */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the object was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the object */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to access the object */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES geospatial_objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Project status (e.g., active, completed, on_hold) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_objects" (
  "project_object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-object association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geospatial object */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the object was assigned to the project */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the object to the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the object within the project (e.g., in_progress, complete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_objects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_objects_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES geospatial_objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geospatial object */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "data" TEXT /* JSON data of the object properties */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_versions_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES geospatial_objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geospatial object */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment for threading */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_comments_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES geospatial_objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES object_comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geospatial object */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the tag (e.g., category, keyword, status) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color associated with the tag for visual distinction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_tags_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES geospatial_objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_tags_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geospatial object */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., image, document) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the file (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_files_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_files_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES geospatial_objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "object_id_1" INTEGER /* Reference to the first geospatial object */,
  "object_id_2" INTEGER /* Reference to the second geospatial object */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of the relationship (e.g., connected, intersecting) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the relationship */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the relationship (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_relationships_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_relationships_object_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("object_id_1") REFERENCES geospatial_objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_relationships_object_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("object_id_2") REFERENCES geospatial_objects ("object_id")
)
